name: Lemon Butter Layers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add butter, lemon extract, and sugar to the dry ingredients. Mix until crumbly.
4. Gradually add beaten eggs to the mixture. Stir until a dough forms.
5. Shape the dough into a flat layer in a greased pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
